name: Nanjing Sinolife United Company Limited
summary: Nanjing Sinolife United Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the research, development, manufacture, processing, sale, and retail of nutritional supplements and packaged health food products. The company is also involved in the trade of food products; provision of information technology maintenance services; and manufacture and sale of cosmetics and skin care products. It sells its products under the Good Health, Zhongsheng, Hejian, and Cobayer series through a network of retail stores. The company also sells its products through distributors, TV shopping, and e-commerce platforms; and chain pharmacies, health goods supermarkets, and tourist souvenir shops. It has operations in Mainland China, Australia, New Zealand, Vietnam, and internationally. Nanjing Sinolife United Company Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Nanjing, China.
